title: Portal 2 Menu Splashes
description: This resource pack replaces the generic splash texts found on the minecraft main menu with Portal 2 References
body:
#  **THIS PROJECT WILL NO LONGER BE ADDING ANY NEW CONTENT. IT WILL ONLY BE UPDATED FOR GAME DROP COMPATIBILITY**




# Portal 2 Splash Pack

This mod aims to add a little bit of **"Apature"** for those portal lovers out there, whilst keeping the game **vanilla**.

## Current position:
- Has **18** different voice lines.
- Most lines are from **GLaDOS**, and a few from the **Announcer**.

## Aims for the future:
- I will add more voice lines, when each minecraft drop comes out, including lines from **Wheatley**, **Cave Johnson**, and other Characters.

## Current Splashes:
- Hello! This is the part where I kill you! (**Wheatley**)
- If the laws of physics no longer apply in the future, God help you. (**Announcer**)
- Oh. Hi. So. How are you holding up? BECAUSE I'M A POTATO! (**GLaDOS**)
- clap...clap...clap (**GLaDOS**)
- Good, my slow clap process still works. So we have that. (**GLaDOS**)
- Aristotle verses MASHY SPIKE PLATE! (**Wheatley**)
- Warning: Neurotoxin pressure has fallen to dangerously unlethal levels. (**Announcer**)
- YEAH! BURNING PEOPLE! HE SAYS WHAT WE'RE ALL THINKING (**GLaDOS**)
- You're a horrible person. That's what it says. We weren't even testing for that. (**GLaDOS**)
- Who wants to make sixty bucks! Cash. (**Cave Johnson**)
- Click click click! Yeah, nailed it! (**Defective Turret**)
- SPAAAAAAAAAAAACE! (**Space Core**)
- Don't let that "horrible person" thing discourage you. It's just a data point. (**GLaDOS**)
- He's not just a regular moron. (**GLaDOS**)
- Some emergency testing may require exposure to lethal military androids. (**Announcer**)
- The Ariel Faith plate isn't calibrated to someone of your... Generousness. (**GLaDOS**)
- Caroline..Caroline.WHERE do I know this woman? (**GLaDOS**)
- Look- metal ball, I CAN hear you. (**GLaDOS**)
- Say apple. Aaaaple (**Wheatley**)
- Very minor case of serious brain damage (**Wheatley**)
- Good news: that is NOT a docking station. (**Wheatley**)
- Potentially apocalyptic significance (**Announcer**)
- Environmental, social, economic or structural collapse (**Announcer**)
- Primitive Tribe (**Announcer**)

**The Game needs to be restarted for the splashes to show.**

A Bedrock Version is available [here](https://github.com/Catmariofan567/Minecraft-Portal-2-Splashes/releases/tag/Bedrock_v1)

Portal is © Valve.
